creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mm          2010-06-01 15:28:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    archivers/xz         Makefile 
  Added files:
    archivers/xz/files   patch-configure 
  Removed files:
    archivers/xz/files   patch-configure.ac 
  Log:
  - Replace patch-configure.ac with patch-configure
  - remove USE_AUTOTOOLS
  
  As we want to use xz for extraction of port's distfiles,
  it cannot depend on autoconf.
  
  PR:             ports/147280
  Approved by:    maintainer (private e-mail)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.14      +1 -5      ports/archivers/xz/Makefile
  1.1       +110 -0    ports/archivers/xz/files/patch-configure (new)
  1.2       +0 -37     ports/archivers/xz/files/patch-configure.ac (dead)
